name: openai-ads-skill
description: Safety-first Agent Skill for planning and validating OpenAI Ads / ChatGPT Ads campaigns.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and validate ChatGPT Ads with safety gates
interface.longDescription: A reusable Agent Skill for planning, validating, and safely operating OpenAI Ads / ChatGPT Ads workflows. It separates planning, validation, paused creation, activation, monitoring, and onboarding so agents cannot silently move from drafting to spend.
defaultPrompt: Plan and validate a ChatGPT Ads campaign.
Check an OpenAI Ads plan for launch risks.
Run a read-only OpenAI Ads account check.
